title: Urticaria follow-up

treatment_and_management.text: States that chronic spontaneous or inducible urticaria can impair quality of life and work or school performance and that the guideline covers classification, diagnosis, and management.
treatment_and_management.rationale: The exact impact statement supports documenting severity, function, quality-of-life, work or school impact and patient concerns without calculating a score.
treatment_and_management.evidence_extract: States that chronic spontaneous or inducible urticaria can impair quality of life and work or school performance and that the guideline covers classification, diagnosis, and management.

source.title: The international EAACI/GA²LEN/EuroGuiDerm/APAAACI guideline for the definition, classification, diagnosis, and management of urticaria

follow_up.text: Defines urticaria as a mast-cell-driven disease presenting with wheals, angioedema, or both and distinguishes acute and chronic forms.
follow_up.rationale: The exact guideline abstract supports documenting an urticaria follow-up, interval course, wheals, angioedema or both, duration and clinician skin or mucosal assessment without inferring acute versus chronic subtype or cause.
follow_up.evidence_extract: Defines urticaria as a mast-cell-driven disease presenting with wheals, angioedema, or both and distinguishes acute and chronic forms.

source.title: The international EAACI/GA²LEN/EuroGuiDerm/APAAACI guideline for the definition, classification, diagnosis, and management of urticaria

source_limitations: Exact wheal timing, angioedema, airway and anaphylaxis assessment, subtype, triggers, medicines, inducibility, disease activity score, diagnosis, tests, treatment, dose, referral, and follow-up remain unsupported.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
All prior supported legacy-item mappings were removed because canonical item-level applicability and workflow-specific rationale were not present in explicit repository records.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
